urdu transliteration text:
Ya Rab Har Ek Ko Ye, S'adat Nasib HoKarbobala Ki Sab Ko, Ziyarat Nasib HoChalo Karbala Chale Ay Sheh Ke Azadaar Ye Dil He Bekaraar Chalo Karbala Chale  O LORD, MAY EVERYBODY HAVE THE PRIVILEGETO PERFORM ZIARAT IN KARBALALET US ALL GO TO KARBALA, OH AZADAAR’S OF IMAMTHIS HEART IS RESTLESS – LET US ALL GO TO KARBALA
@HujjatELC
